subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 7: Writing
description: Viết bài luận về bảo tồn động vật hoang dã

theory.title: Writing: An Essay About Wildlife Conservation

sections.heading: Writing Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Writing an essay about wildlife conservation

Cấu trúc bài luận:

  • Introduction: Giới thiệu vấn đề bảo tồn động vật hoang dã
  • Body 1: Nguyên nhân (poaching, habitat loss, climate change)
  • Body 2: Hậu quả và giải pháp
  • Conclusion: Kết luận và kêu gọi hành động

Useful language:

  • If we don't act, species will disappear.
  • Unless we protect habitats, animals will die.
  • The more we care, the more species survive.
  • Conservation is more important than ever.
  • We should protect wildlife as much as possible.

exercises.question: What should the introduction include?
exercises.explanation: Mở bài nên giới thiệu vấn đề bảo tồn.

exercises.question: Which linking word shows contrast?
exercises.explanation: 'However' thể hiện sự tương phản.

exercises.question: What should body paragraphs include?
options: Causes, effects, and solutions with examples
exercises.explanation: Đoạn thân bài cần nguyên nhân, hậu quả, giải pháp và ví dụ.

exercises.question: Which phrase introduces an example?
exercises.explanation: 'For example' dùng để đưa ra ví dụ.

exercises.question: How should you start a conclusion?
exercises.explanation: Kết bài nên bắt đầu với 'In conclusion' hoặc 'To sum up'.

exercises.question: Which is correct for discussing threats?
options: If we don't protect habitats, animals will die.
If we don't protect habitats, animals dies.
If we doesn't protect habitats, animals will die.
If we don't protecting habitats, animals will die.
exercises.explanation: If + Present Simple, will + V - điều kiện loại 1.

exercises.question: Which linking word shows result?
exercises.explanation: 'Therefore' thể hiện kết quả.

exercises.question: What is a good thesis statement?
options: Wildlife conservation is urgent and requires immediate action
exercises.explanation: Luận điểm tốt nêu rõ vấn đề và tầm quan trọng.

exercises.question: Which conditional form is correct?
options: Unless we act, species will disappear.
Unless we don't act, species will disappear.
Unless we acts, species will disappear.
Unless we acting, species will disappear.
exercises.explanation: Unless + khẳng định (không dùng 'not').

exercises.question: Which phrase adds information?
exercises.explanation: 'Moreover' dùng để thêm thông tin.

exercises.question: What should you do in the conclusion?
options: Summarize main points and call for action
exercises.explanation: Kết bài nên tóm tắt và kêu gọi hành động.

exercises.question: Which comparative form is correct?
options: The more we protect, the more species survive.
The more we protect, the more species survives.
The more we protects, the more species survive.
The more we protecting, the more species survive.
exercises.explanation: The...the - so sánh kép đúng.

exercises.question: Which phrase discusses urgency?
options: Conservation is more important than ever
exercises.explanation: Câu này nhấn mạnh sự cấp thiết.

exercises.question: What is a good supporting detail?
options: Tigers are endangered due to habitat loss and poaching
exercises.explanation: Chi tiết hỗ trợ tốt cung cấp thông tin cụ thể và nguyên nhân.

exercises.question: Which sentence uses conditional correctly?
options: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
If we protects habitats, animals will survive.
If we protect habitats, animals survives.
If we protecting habitats, animals will survive.
exercises.explanation: If + Present Simple, will + V - điều kiện loại 1 đúng.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these are good writing practices (True/False):
options: Use linking words to connect ideas
Write very long sentences without punctuation
Use conditional clauses when discussing conservation
exercises.explanation: a) True - Nên dùng từ nối. b) False - Không nên viết câu quá dài. c) True - Nên hỗ trợ bằng ví dụ. d) True - Nên dùng mệnh đề điều kiện.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the sentence is correct:
options: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
Unless we act, species will disappear.
The more we protect, the more species survive.
Conservation is more important than never.
exercises.explanation: a) True - If + Present, will + V. b) True - Unless + khẳng định. c) True - The...the. d) False - Phải là 'than ever'.

exercises.question_text: Complete: In _____, wildlife conservation is urgent. (one word)
exercises.explanation: 'In conclusion' - Tóm lại.

exercises.question_text: Complete: _____ example, tigers are endangered. (one word)
exercises.explanation: 'For example' - Ví dụ.

exercises.question_text: Complete: _____ we act, species will disappear. (Unless/If)
exercises.explanation: Unless = If not - trừ khi.
